title: Thunder Infinity
description:
Thunder Infinity is a shmup that blends the precision and challenge of classic arcade shooters with the frantic intensity of survivor-like games, creating a fast, addictive, and highly entertaining action experience.

Choose your pilot, ship, and weapons before launching from the Star Bastion into increasingly demanding missions.

And if you fail... no problem! Your pilots will improve their skills, your ships can be upgraded, and you will return to face the evil Varkon with even more power than before.

Key Features

[]4 pilots with different abilities and skills[]8 ships with unique stats and weapon setups[]Over 50 weapons in the game[]Pilot, ship, and equipment progression
If you enjoy shmups, survivor-likes, roguelites, arcade action games, or simply having fun... give Thunder Infinity a try.
description_short: Thunder Infinity takes classic shoot 'em up gameplay to the next level by adding survival, roguelite, and bullet hell elements. Choose your pilot, ship, and weapons, and destroy the Varkon Star Empire in the final offensive of the Aegis Star Bastion.
